gates.name: Social route execution
gates.message: SocialMediaEnricher completed or records deferred status.

gates.name: Sentiment route execution
gates.message: DDSentimentEngine completed or records deferred status.

gates.name: Platform/source URLs
gates.message: Social findings require source URLs before public promotion.

gates.name: Guarded social rule
gates.message: LinkedIn/social remains discovery or corroboration only.

gates.name: Composite rule
gates.message: Sentiment supports triage; it cannot become legal/finance/ownership proof.

gates.name: Public hygiene
gates.message: Public findings contain no raw provider diagnostics.

public_report_rule: Promote only source-backed social context and guarded sentiment conclusions; keep provider errors internal.
